title: Mesozoic Ore Fossilmon
description: Adds Mesozoic Ore Fossilmons that can be resurrected with Bones, Cobblestone, & Ores.
body:
How to Install Download the latest version from Modrinth, and add the Folder to both "resourcepacks" folder and, when creating a world, to "datapacks" folder.

Discord addon link: 

For suggestions, teasers, and polls, check out this Discord thread: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1370212659928240238

Adds Mesozoic Ore Fossilmons that can be resurrected with Bones, Cobblestone & Ores.

It includes the following:

Ankylub/Ankylonorse
Type: Rock/Electric
Ore: Copper
Mesozoic Creature: Ankylosaurus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Raining

Airaptor/Velocigaletor
Type: Rock/Steel
Ore: Iron
Mesozoic Creature: Velociraptor
Evolve at Level 39

Thagolt/Stegostormus
Type: Rock/Electric
Ore: Gold
Mesozoic Creature: Stegosaurus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Raining and Thundering

Hadrosong/Parasonorous
Type: Rock/Fairy
Ore: Diamond
Mesozoic Creature: Parasaurolophus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Dirtops/Triceraearth
Type: Rock/Psychic
Ore: Emerald
Mesozoic Creature: Triceratops
Evolve at Level 39

Sapsaur/Brachioforest
Type: Rock/Grass
Ore: Resin Brick (For Now Dark Oak Sapling)
Mesozoic Creature: Brachiosaurus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Zinolung/Therizinochant
Type: Rock/Fairy
Ore: Lapis Lazuli
Mesozoic Creature: Therizinosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Abeliwatt/Carnocharge
Type: Rock/Electric
Ore: Redstone Dust
Mesozoic Creature: Carnotaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Pterashine/Pteranoquartz
Type: Rock/Fire
Ore: Nether Quartz
Mesozoic Creature: Pteranodon
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Mosaglow/Mosasculk
Type: Rock/Psychic
Ore: Amethyst Shard
Mesozoic Creature: Mosasaurus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Night Time

Spinot/Spinospecter
Type: Rock/Ghost
Ore: Netherite
Mesozoic Creature: Spinosaurus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Night Time

Dryocoal/Iguanochar
Type: Rock/Fire
Ore: Coal
Mesozoic Creature: Iguanodon
Evolve at Level 39

Thagma/Kentrocano
Type: Rock/Fire
Ore: Nether Gold
Mesozoic Creature: Kentrosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Gigant/Giganotodread
Type: Rock/Dark
Ore: Gilded Blackstone
Mesozoic Creature: Giganotosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Silestone/Heterok, Plateonyx, or Coelosky
Type: Rock/Normal, Ground, or Flying
Ore: Tumblestones
Mesozoic Creature: Silesaurus, Heterodontosaurus, Plateosaurus, and Coelophysis
Evolve using the types of tumblestones: Heterok (Tumblestone), Plateonyx (Black Tumblestone), or Coelosky (Sky Tumblestone)

Ichypris/Ophthaloguard/Shoniguardian
Type: Rock/Water -> Fairy/Water
Ore: Prismarine Shards
Mesozoic Creature: Ichthyosaurus
Evolve at Level 24 & Level 48

Elaslumi/Styxolantern
Type: Rock/Water
Ore: Prismarine Crystals
Mesozoic Creature: Elasmosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Tapeglow/Tupanwyvern
Type: Rock/Dragon
Ore: Glowstone Dust
Mesozoic Creature: Tapejara
Evolve at Level 39

Centorch/Styracosear
Type: Rock/Fire
Ore: Fire Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Styracosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Pliotide/Liopleurotidal
Type: Rock/Water
Ore: Water Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Liopleurodon
Evolve at Level 39

Saurobolt/Titanothunder
Type: Rock/Electric
Ore: Thunder Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Argentinosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Anatoflora/Edmontoleaf
Type: Rock/Grass
Ore: Leaf Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Edmontosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Yutyrunt/Yutyrantrum
Type: Rock/Ice
Ore: Ice Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Yutyrannus
Evolve at Level 39

Gallimoon/Deinolunar
Type: Rock/Psychic
Ore: Moon Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Gallimimus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Night Time

Diloght/Dilophosolar
Type: Rock/Fighting
Ore: Sun Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Dilophosaurus
Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Ovidawn/Gigantodawn
Type: Rock/Fairy
Ore: Dawn Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Oviraptor
Evolve at Level 39

Troodusk/Stenodusk
Type: Rock/Dark
Ore: Dusk Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Troodon
Evolve at Level 39

Pteropix/Azhfaegon/Quetzalaztec
Type: Rock->Dragon/Fairy
Ore: Shiny Stone
Mesozoic Creature: Quetzalcoatlus
Evolve at Level 24 & Level 48
